title: Translation

originalText.description: The original text, in the language specified in the from field, that was input into the text field in the request.

translatedText.description: The translation of the original text into the language specified in the to field.

description:
This type is used by the translations array, which shows the original text supplied by the user in the request payload, and the text translated by eBay.

Only one input string can be translated at this time. Support for multiple continuous text strings is expected in the future.
